text:

svn .diff

Maintainer/Upstream Update 0.1.1 -> 0.2

https://gitlab.com/alfix/nsysctl

This version should avoid "Segmentation fault" and show all the OIDs

Testing:

 * portlint -C
 * port test
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -i -o sysutils/nsysctl


Please commit it,

Thanks,
Alfonso
